items.headline: Gold price steadies at $4,400/oz after heavy sell-off

items.headline: DCCC launches geotargeted digital ad campaign hitting GOP for gas prices

items.headline: Puig stock soars 15% after Estée Lauder confirms takeover talks with Charlotte Tilbury maker
items.summary: Shares of Puig Brands soared as much as 15% Tuesday after beauty peer Estée Lauder confirmed it is in talks about merging the two companies.

items.headline: Britain responds to Iran war energy shock by requiring solar panels and heat pumps in all new homes

items.headline: How the economy would weather private-credit defaults rising to financial crisis-like levels
